text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
237 

RX_VRSN 
LABEL: 
Rx Version Representing the Iteration of the File 
DESCRIPTION: Indicator representing the iteration of the file. 
SHORT NAME: RX_VRSN 
LONG NAME: RX_VRSN 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims (derived) 
FILE(S): 
RX header 
VALUES: 
Two-digit values from 01–XX 
COMMENT: 
A version number where the value 01 is assigned to the original
